query:
SELECT 
  p.name as projectName,
  pa.id as assignmentId,
  pa.subcontractorId,
  pa.role,
  s.id as subId,
  s.companyName
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN project_assignments pa ON p.id = pa.projectId
LEFT JOIN subcontractors s ON pa.subcontractorId = s.id
WHERE p.name IN ('44 hudson', '144 clymer')
ORDER BY p.name, pa.id;
